expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Navigation tab 'Hot Games' is cut off and shows only 'Hot Gam' at the right edge of the tab bar, making it unreadable and indicating horizontal overflow or improper truncation handling.

Multiple game card thumbnails in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are cut off on the right side (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'), with game titles partially hidden and images clipped, making them unreadable.

In the 'Top Played New Games' section, the rightmost game card column is also clipped (e.g., 'HYPERC...' and 'DAR WATE...'), making content partially invisible with no affordance indicating horizontal scrollability.

The promotional banner text 'BET IT ON BLACK AND GOLD!' appears to be Pittsburgh Penguins themed, but the copy is ambiguous for a casino context and may confuse users unfamiliar with the sports tie-in.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention any spelling error or the word 'Jackpots' or 'Jacpots'; all reported issues focus on layout truncation and clipping problems.
